title: Cursor Changed How We Code. This Tool Changes How We Design.

sections.title: Design Workflow Problem at Popp
key_points: Designer creates 20 Figma projects per week with timestamps
Scope creep issue: designs change during sprints without clear version tracking
Timestamp solution creates navigation nightmare - 10 minutes wasted every few hours
Difficulty finding correct design files and navigating links

sections.title: Introduction to Pencil.dev Solution
key_points: Pencil.dev is a canvas design tool that integrates with IDE
Design files can exist directly in code repository
Version controlled with Git for better tracking
Files can be easily referenced within development workflow
Tool recommended by colleague, immediate appeal to author

sections.title: Author's Due Diligence
key_points: Author contacted Tom Krcha (Pencil.dev creator) directly
Concerns about lack of visible pricing information
Uncertainty about usage metrics and billing model

summary.title: Pencil.dev: Git-Integrated Design Tool for Developer-Designer Workflow
takeaways: Traditional design tools like Figma create version control and navigation problems in development workflows
Pencil.dev offers IDE integration and Git-based version control for design files
The tool aims to bridge the gap between design and development by bringing design into the code repository
Timestamp-based versioning in Figma creates significant workflow inefficiencies
actionable: Evaluate Pencil.dev as alternative to Figma for teams with scope creep issues
Consider integrating design files directly into code repositories
Implement proper version control for design assets using Git
Research pricing and usage models before adopting new design tools

sections.title: Popp公司的设计工作流问题
key_points: 设计师每周创建20个带时间戳的Figma项目
范围蔓延问题：设计在冲刺期间发生变化，没有清晰的版本跟踪
时间戳解决方案造成导航噩梦 - 每隔几小时浪费10分钟
难以找到正确的设计文件和导航链接

sections.title: Pencil.dev解决方案介绍
key_points: Pencil.dev是一个与IDE集成的画布设计工具
设计文件可以直接存在于代码仓库中
通过Git进行版本控制以实现更好的跟踪
文件可以在开发工作流中轻松引用
工具由同事推荐，立即吸引了作者

sections.title: 作者的尽职调查
key_points: 作者直接联系了Tom Krcha（Pencil.dev创建者）
对缺乏可见定价信息的担忧
对使用指标和计费模式的不确定性

summary.title: Pencil.dev：面向开发者-设计师工作流的Git集成设计工具
takeaways: 像Figma这样的传统设计工具在开发工作流中会产生版本控制和导航问题
Pencil.dev提供IDE集成和基于Git的设计文件版本控制
该工具旨在通过将设计引入代码仓库来弥合设计和开发之间的差距
Figma中基于时间戳的版本控制会造成显著的工作流效率低下
concepts: 设计中的范围蔓延管理
actionable: 评估Pencil.dev作为有范围蔓延问题团队的Figma替代方案
考虑将设计文件直接集成到代码仓库中
使用Git为设计资产实施适当的版本控制
在采用新设计工具之前研究定价和使用模式
